news.t: ETF Prime: ETF Inflows on Pace to Shatter Annual Record
Simplify Asset Management Launches the Simplify DBi CTA Managed Futures Index ETF (SDMF), Expanding Its Managed Futures Lineup with a Rules-Based, Index-Driven Strategy

overview.description: The Simplify DBi CTA Managed Futures Index ETF (SDMF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DBi CTA MF index. The fund is a passively managed alternative fund that aims to replicate the performance of the largest managed futures funds. The fund uses a replication strategy to reflect the performance of various futures contracts across major asset classes. SDMF was launched on Feb 17, 2026 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: ETF Prime: ETF Inflows on Pace to Shatter Annual Record
data.text: Exchange traded fund inflows have topped $750 billion in 2026. This puts the industry on pace to challenge the $1.5 trillion annual record set last year, Todd Rosenbluth, head of research at VettaFi, ...

data.title: Simplify Asset Management Launches the Simplify DBi CTA Managed Futures Index ETF (SDMF), Expanding Its Managed Futures Lineup with a Rules-Based, Index-Driven Strategy
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management launches SDMF ETF, tracking the DBi CTA Managed Futures Index.
